user.title: Sub-Zero Group Login
user.description:
1. Open this link to log in: [Sub-Zero Login]({auth_url})
2. After logging in, your browser will show an error page. Copy the full URL from the address bar.
3. Paste it below.

error.invalid_url: No authorization code found in the URL. Make sure you copied the full redirect URL starting with msauth.com.subzero.group.owners.app://auth?code=...

init.title: Enable Local Control
init.description: Select an appliance to enable local control. Make sure a door on the appliance is open, then click Submit. The PIN will be displayed on the appliance.

enter_pin.title: Enter PIN
enter_pin.description: A 6-digit PIN should now be showing on the appliance display. Enter it below.

abort.not_loaded: Integration is not loaded. Please restart Home Assistant.
abort.no_local_devices: No appliances support local control. Local control is only available for older CAT-module appliances.

error.invalid_pin: PIN must be exactly 6 digits (numbers only).
error.wrong_pin: PIN rejected by the appliance. Make sure you entered the correct 6-digit code from the display.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the appliance. Make sure it is online and reachable on the network.
